name: Tricolor Crudites Platter
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Plus 1 T red wine vinegar
2 tbsp Minced fresh chives or Green onions
2 Large cucumbers, peeled, halved, seeded, thinly sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Whisk vinegar and Dijon mustard together in a small bowl until blended.
2. Gradually whisk in olive oil until the mixture is smooth.
3. Mix in basil (fresh or dried), chives (fresh or dried), and rosemary (fresh or dried).
4. Season the dressing with salt and pepper to taste.
5. Cover and refrigerate; dressing can be prepared up to one day ahead.
6. Toss cucumbers and 2 teaspoons of salt together in a bowl until coated.
7. Let the mixture stand for at least one hour, then rinse and drain well.
8. Place the cucumber mixture in a small bowl and add enough dressing to coat thoroughly.
9. In separate bowls, toss beets, carrots, and zucchini with enough dressing to coat each vegetable.
10. Cover vegetables and chill if making ahead of time (up to four hours).
11. Arrange the vegetables on a platter and garnish with radishes before serving.
